response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, current role explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling matching the role's AI requirement, and demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, databases, and DevOps. Stack alignment and seniority both clearly exceed the 6+ year bar.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly matches a key requirement
Broad polyglot background (Java, C++, D, Python-adjacent) with DevOps and architecture exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated
